Localization.Description: The SharpHound (BloodHound) utility was started using the LoggedOn method. This method allows you to collect information about user sessions on different domain hosts.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} started utility {object.process.name} whose behavior is specific to the SharpHound (BloodHound) software to collect information about user sessions on different hosts
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} performed actions similar to the SharpHound (BloodHound) software activity to collect information about user sessions on different hosts
